query: SELECT configKey, configValue, updatedAt FROM platform_config WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_TEST_MODE', 'TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID', 'TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN') ORDER BY configKey;
